title: Investing In UAP Disclosure, And How To Manage Risk
text: The US government is investigating Unknown Aerial Phenomenon (UAP) and discussing the Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Disclosure Act, which could become law. The act would allow the government to seize non-human technologies currently being developed by private corporations, potentially impacting investment markets. Whistleblower David Grusch claims the US government possesses spacecraft reverse-engineered with non-human technology, which could significantly benefit companies such as Lockheed, Northrop Grumman, General Dynamics, Raytheon, and SpaceX.
